title: Piper contraverrugosum
intro: Piper contraverrugosum, also known as "Sarawak long pepper," is a plant species in the Piperaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The health benefits of Piper contraverrugosum include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as pain management, respiratory issues, and infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include piperine, a bioavailable compound with enhanced bioavailability of other nutrients, as well as other alkaloids, terpenoids, and flavonoids. Piper contraverrugosum is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and bioavailability.
